hero.title: Packers & Movers in Patna
hero.subtitle: Boring Road to Bailey Road, Patliputra to Danapur — 390+ verified movers in Bihar's capital.

intro: Patna is Bihar's fast-growing capital on the Ganga's south bank. ShiftIndia's 390+ verified vendors cover the entire city — from old Patna City near Patna Sahib to new colonies along Boring Road, Bailey Road, and Danapur Cantonment.
whyUs: Patna's Ganga bridges and Bypass Road are the main logistics arteries. Our vendors plan routes efficiently around these to avoid delays during peak hours.

faqs.q: Do you cover Danapur and Phulwari Sharif?
faqs.a: Yes — all areas in Patna Metropolitan including Danapur, Phulwari Sharif, Fatuha and Khagaul.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Patna?
Do you move to Ranchi and Varanasi?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves are available with GPS tracking and ₹5L damage protection.
